# Session 90 Summary

- Sorry count before/after: 0 / 0
- Prover lane: NONE (intentional no-dispatch; `no_prover_lane: true`)
- Date: 2026-06-19

## No-Prover-Lane Condition
No prover ran this iter. Mechanical hard gates:
- 0 inline sorries project-wide
- 4 frontier nodes all lack Lean declarations (2 with used-by=0 are dead-ends)
- Build chain actively progressing in background

- sync_leanok iter=90: sha=075960c, added=0, removed=0, duration=110s (ran at 01:25 UTC, before Mid1 olean completion)
- Build speed: ~2-4K HB/s. Full chain completion estimated ~13:00-14:00 CST Jun 19 from 08:37 CST start.

## Style Linter Observations
During a 60s lake build attempt (killed by timeout), style warnings were observed:
- `set_option maxHeartbeats` without inline comment in: Mid1:45, Mid1:215, Mid2:27,60,104,130, Top:28,135,256,274,370, Aux:31,66,203, Leg:111,417,624
- `CechHigherDirectImage.lean:337,364,430` same warning; also line-length warnings on CHDI and CechAcyclic
- These are WARNING-severity (not errors); do NOT block lake build. The 60s build killed by SIGTERM (timeout), not by linter failure.
